\tzpentry{ID4421}{Pi Expectation Value}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4421 introduces Pi Expectation Value as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} k(s_i) = k_0 + d_i(\pi), \qquad \langle k \rangle \xrightarrow[\text{ergodic}]{} \pi, \end{equation}
